display_name: Lumi Studio Publisher Search Intent Catalogue
description: A first-party catalogue of who each app is designed for, the task they are trying to complete, and the direct App Store path.
long_description: A first-party catalogue of who each app is designed for, the task they are trying to complete, and the direct App Store path. This is first-party material published by Lumi Studio, the developer of every listed app. The queries are editorial descriptions of intended use cases, not measured search-volume data, rankings, independent reviews, or user endorsements.
